heading: Location fee
label: 28g Location fee
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, for every unpatented mining claim, mill or tunnel site located after , to the extent provided in advance in Appropriations Acts, pursuant to the Mining Laws of the United States, the locator shall, at the time the location notice is recorded with the Bureau of Land Management, pay to the Secretary of the Interior a location fee, in addition to the claim maintenance fee required by , of $25.00 per claim.August 10, 1993section 28f of this title
notes: Codification, which directed the amendment of , United States Code, was executed by making the amendment to , which is classified to this section, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.
